name: Deb's Veggie Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup V-8 juice, warmed to room temperature
1 Tablespoon Chopped scotch bonnet pepper (jalapeno would work too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the warmed V-8 juice into a bowl.
2. Add the Feta cheese, chopped basil leaves, scotch bonnet pepper, black olives, olive oil, salt, sugar, and all-purpose flour to the bowl with the warm juice.
3. Sprinkle the rapid rising yeast over the mixture.
4. Mix everything together until a dough forms.
5. Transfer the dough to your breadmaker and follow the fast bread program for 2 hours and 40 minutes, including cooling time.
6. The resulting loaf is moist and delicious, with your husband loving it so much he insisted you share the recipe. Enjoy!
